'''Fabreini MicroElectronics Limited''' was a [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]-based jewelry company. Their pins and brooches had built in micro-electronics and light-emitting matrices. They created the [[Coruscant Cascader BPEA-IA|Coruscant Cascader]].

{{Company-stub}}
